vol_description: This volume contains short clips showing social behavior among mice housed together in a a home-cage monitored 24/7. There are videos of adult mice mating and dams interacting with their pups.

A female and a male C57BL/6 mice engaging in social and reproductive behaviors in their homecage.
First two hours of introducing the mice to each other.
All behaviors occur in designated breeding cage under 24-hour observation
Videos for Carcea et al. submission.

- 3-hour long .mp4 video files of a mouse dam and pup(s) 
- Pups range from post-natal day 5 to 19
- Animals are recorded in a temperature and light controlled (12 hour light/dark cycle) behavior box with ad libitum access to food pellets and water (hydrogel)

vol_name: Long-term monitoring of maternal behavior - SfN
vol_description: Videos of mice in behavioral box.
